languages.text: "Что ж. Во всяком случае, это значит, что весь мой род не погибнет сегодня".
"I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."
languages.original_text: "Что ж. Во всяком случае, это значит, что весь мой род не погибнет сегодня".

traits.locale_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."
"I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."
"I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

languages.text: “我明白了。那至少说明，我这一支血脉今天不会断绝。”
languages.original_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

traits.locale_text: “我明白了。那至少说明，我这一支血脉今天不会断绝。”

languages.text: « Je vois. Au moins, cela signifie que ma lignée tout entière ne va pas disparaître aujourd'hui. »
languages.original_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois. Au moins, cela signifie que ma lignée tout entière ne va pas disparaître aujourd'hui. »

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Öyle ya da böyle bu, soyumun tümünün bugün yitip gitmeyeceği anlamına geliyor."
languages.original_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Öyle ya da böyle bu, soyumun tümünün bugün yitip gitmeyeceği anlamına geliyor."

languages.text: «Ya veo. En cualquier caso, eso significa que hoy no perderé a toda mi familia».
languages.original_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

traits.locale_text: «Ya veo. En cualquier caso, eso significa que hoy no perderé a toda mi familia».

languages.text: "Ich verstehe. Wie dem auch sei, das heißt, dass heute nicht meine ganze Linie ausgelöscht wird."
languages.original_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe. Wie dem auch sei, das heißt, dass heute nicht meine ganze Linie ausgelöscht wird."

languages.text: 「なるほど。いずれにしても、今日は私の家系が絶滅するわけではないということですね。」
languages.original_text: "I see. At any rate, that means that my entire line won't perish today."

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど。いずれにしても、今日は私の家系が絶滅するわけではないということですね。」
